title: Ancient Debris Finder
description: Highlight Ancient Debris instantly and dominate Netherite mining.
body: # 🔥 NetherX Finder **See what others miss. Mine like a pro in the Nether.** NetherX Finder is a powerful yet lightweight visual enhancement pack that lets you **detect Ancient Debris instantly**, giving you a serious edge while mining in the Nether. No more blind digging. No more wasted time. Just **pure efficiency.** --- ## ✨ Features - 🔍 Advanced highlight system for **Ancient Debris** - ⚡ Ultra-lightweight — zero FPS drop - 🎯 Built for speed mining & Netherite farming - 🧱 Clean, distraction-free visuals - 💻 Smooth performance on all devices (low-end to high-end) --- ## 🌐 Connect with Own Studio --- ⚔️ Teams • 💰 Economy • 🎁 Custom Ranks - 🎮 **IP:** play.ownverse.fun - 🔌 **Port**: 19132 - 💬 **Discord:** [𝗢𝘄𝗻_𝗩𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗲™ 𝗦𝗠𝗣](https://discord.gg/WS6nnzeeKF) > ❤️ Sponsored by [Server.pro](https://server.pro/) ## Join now and start your adventure! --- ## [Server.pro](https://server.pro/) 🔥 Want smooth Minecraft hosting with no lag?
